scope: Public content, service route promotion, reviews, ratings, customer counts, insurance, warranty, waiting-room, certification, equipment, media, guide backlog, and owner approval.

source_changes.change: Removed public rendering and imported public dictionary fields for internal evidence, source notes, owner-review status, and growth-ready blocker copy.
Added a service route registry and promoted-route helper so generated noindex service fallback pages are resolvable but not promoted from public service navigation or related-service links.
Softened or removed unsupported claims for ratings, 500+ customers, certification, modern/latest equipment, blanket warranty, waiting-room amenities, premium delivery, and tire-hotel insurance.
Replaced visible [TBD] placeholders with catalog prices where available or booking-confirmed price/duration language.
Product rating/review display now requires review_source=owner_verified in addition to numeric rating and review_count.

Added npm run content:claims:check to fail on internal audit copy, [TBD] placeholders, fake-looking ratings/customer counts, certification, insurance, warranty, waiting-room, and premium-delivery proof phrases.

claim_register.previous_risk: Service detail pages rendered Content review, source notes, and Business/service owner review required before growth-ready classification.
claim_register.d5_action: Removed from public rendering and from imported service SEO evidence objects.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Keep internal governance in board/reports, not public page dictionaries.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public dictionaries included 4.8/4.9 rating copy and sample testimonial text; product pages could show rating/review_count without source approval.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced generic review strings with review-policy copy and gated product review UI on owner_verified review source.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Approved review source, permission, policy, platform terms, and display rules.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public trust copy claimed over 500 satisfied customers.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced with clear booking/contact process copy.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Owner-approved customer count source and calculation window before any customer-count claim returns.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public copy claimed certified technicians without proof packet.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced with service-team and vehicle-specific work-confirmation language.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Named certifications, scope, dates, issuer, and reviewer approval.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public copy claimed latest/modern diagnostic equipment.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced with service-need-specific diagnostic and repair approach copy.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Equipment list, usage scope, photos, and service-owner approval before stronger claims.

claim_register.previous_risk: Car service FAQ implied manufacturer warranty remains valid.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Warranty policy, part/source policy, and legal/service-owner approval.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public FAQ claimed waiting area with free Wi-Fi, coffee, and entertainment.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced with confirm waiting options before visit.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Facility proof, hours/availability, amenities, photos, and owner approval.

claim_register.previous_risk: Public tire-hotel copy claimed comprehensive insurance, full coverage, and premium free delivery.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced with service terms, liability/compensation confirmation, and booking-specific pickup/install language.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Signed storage terms, insurance/liability policy, delivery policy, and legal approval.

claim_register.previous_risk: Legacy service pages and FAQs showed [TBD] prices and durations.
claim_register.d5_action: Replaced placeholders with catalog prices or booking-confirmed language.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Service owner confirms final prices and durations before stronger exact claims.

claim_register.previous_risk: Generated noindex service detail pages were promoted from public service navigation.
claim_register.d5_action: Added promoted route helper and registry. Public navigation now links only bespoke indexable service pages.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Unique owner-approved content, reviewer, media, indexability, sitemap, and internal-link approval before promotion.

claim_register.previous_risk: Growth plan recommends guides, but owner evidence/reviewer/source plan is not complete.
claim_register.d5_action: Kept guide/category content as backlog until source evidence, reviewer, purpose, internal links, update trigger, and safety classification exist.
claim_register.owner_evidence_required: Guide briefs, sources, reviewer, media, date/update cadence, safety classification, and commercial next step.

route_policy.promoted_indexable_service_pages: Only service IDs with bespoke ServiceSeoPage mappings are promoted from service hub and related-service links.
route_policy.generated_service_pages: Generated fallback routes remain resolvable with noindex, follow for direct/legacy handling but are not promoted until they have owner-approved unique content.
route_policy.sitemap_policy: Only promoted bespoke service pages should be included in public sitemaps.
route_policy.internal_link_policy: Service hub and related-service cards use getPromotedServiceDetailPathForServiceId; booking buttons may still open the booking modal for catalog services.

verification: rg forbidden public governance and [TBD] scan
blockers: Owner proof for reviews, ratings, customer counts, facility amenities, certifications, equipment, warranty, insurance/liability, media, service reviewer identity, and service availability remains unavailable.
GBP/citation conflicts from D-2 remain unresolved.
Merchant/product policy owner approvals from D-3 remain unresolved.
Live production raw HTML and static asset blockers from Phase B/D-1 remain unresolved.
Guide/category expansion remains blocked until owner-reviewed source briefs exist.

gate_result.next_required_task: E-1 - Figma Make Preview Verification And Patch-State Ledger
